thinking.text: Let me explain the situation clearly to the user.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Great news! Yes, your friend can reapply now, and you should be able to earn the referral bonus for them this time. Here's why:

The initial rejection happened because it fell within the same 7-day rolling window as your first two successful referrals (the weekly cap of 2). Since it's now November 14th — well past that window — that's no longer an issue.

The Platinum Rewards Card has a referral program where you earn **$100** when your referred friend is approved and spends at least **$1,500 within 90 days** of opening the account.

To get started, I've unlocked a tool for you — please use the **`get_referral_link`** function with your user ID (`76ad9cc60e`) and the card name (`Platinum Rewards Card`) to generate a fresh referral link. You can then share that new link with your friend so they can reapply. Make sure your friend uses that new link so the referral gets properly tracked to your account!

Would you like any further help?
